mapper.select: SELECT UTLINSTT_ID, INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT rcm.UTLINSTT_ID , eim.ETNM AS BPLC_NM , tbivcl.INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD , ccd.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_CMP_PTRN_NM , eid.ENPR_INRD_CON
, CASE WHEN TRIM(eim.CMPNY_LOGO_IMAGE_FILE) IS NULL THEN eim.CMPNY_LOGO_BASS_IMAGE_FILE ELSE eim.CMPNY_LOGO_IMAGE_FILE END AS LOGO_IMAGE_URL
, CASE WHEN TRIM(eim.CMPNY_LOGO_IMAGE_FILE) IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS DEFAULT_LOGO_YN
, ROWNUM FROM ( SELECT main.COM_ID, main.VC_ID AS UTLINSTT_ID, SUM(main.TOTAL) FROM (
SELECT hpd.UTLINSTT_ID AS COM_ID , stg.UTLINSTT_ID AS VC_ID
, 1 AS TOTAL FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_HOPE_D hpd INNER JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_STG_R stg ON hpd.INVM_STG_CD = stg.INVM_STG_CD
UNION ALL
SELECT hpd.UTLINSTT_ID AS COM_ID , amt.UTLINSTT_ID AS VC_ID
, 1.2 AS TOTAL FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_HOPE_D hpd INNER JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_AMT_R amt ON hpd.INVM_AMT_CD = amt.INVM_AMT_CD
UNION ALL
SELECT f1.UTLINSTT_ID AS COM_ID , f2.UTLINSTT_ID AS VC_ID , NVL(COUNT(f1.INVM_FILD_CD), 0) * 1.1 AS TOTAL FROM ( SELECT fild.* FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_IVFL_R fild LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L vl ON fild.UTLINSTT_ID = vl.UTLINSTT_ID WHERE (vl.UTLINSTT_ID IS NULL OR vl.USE_YN != 'Y') ) f1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT fild.* FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_IVFL_R fild INNER JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L vl ON fild.UTLINSTT_ID = vl.UTLINSTT_ID ) f2 ON f1.INVM_FILD_CD = f2.INVM_FILD_CD GROUP BY f1.UTLINSTT_ID, f2.UTLINSTT_ID
) main LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L vc_chk ON vc_chk.UTLINSTT_ID = main.VC_ID
WHERE main.COM_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND (vc_chk.UTLINSTT_ID IS NOT NULL AND vc_chk.USE_YN = 'Y') GROUP BY main.COM_ID, main.VC_ID ORDER BY SUM(main.TOTAL) DESC, DBMS_RANDOM.RANDOM ) rcm
INNER JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim ON eim.UTLINSTT_ID = rcm.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L tbivcl ON tbivcl.UTLINSTT_ID = rcm.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON ccd.COM_CD_ID = tbivcl.INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_D eid ON eid.UTLINSTT_ID = rcm.UTLINSTT_ID
WHERE 1=1 AND eim.ACVT_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM < 19

SELECT eim.UTLINSTT_ID , eim.* , eim.ETNM AS BPLC_NM , eim.BZN AS BIZRNO , TO_NUMBER(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY')) - decode(trim(eim.INCR_YMD), NULL, null, (TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(eim.INCR_YMD, 0, 4)))) AS YEAR_CNT
, tbivcl.INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD , ccd.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_CMP_PTRN_NM , nid.EMP_CNT , nid.CREW_RTRV , nid.ENPR_INRD_CON
, CASE WHEN tbivcl.INVMEXNT_RAP_LMTN_MNCT IS NULL THEN 12 ELSE tbivcl.INVMEXNT_RAP_LMTN_MNCT END INVMEXNT_RAP_LMTN_MNCT FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L tbivcl ON eim.UTLINSTT_ID = tbivcl.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON ccd.COM_CD_ID = tbivcl.INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_D nid ON eim.UTLINSTT_ID = nid.UTLINSTT_ID
WHERE 1=1
AND tbivcl.UTLINSTT_ID IS NOT NULL AND tbivcl.USE_YN = 'Y' AND eim.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , CNRN_FILD_SQN , CNRN_FILD_NM , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_CNRN_FILD_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY CNRN_FILD_SQN

SELECT eir.UTLINSTT_ID , eir.INVM_FILD_CD , eir.RGSN_USER_ID , eir.RGSN_TS
, ifc.INVM_FILD_CDNM AS INVM_FILD_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_IVFL_R eir LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_FILD_C ifc ON eir.INVM_FILD_CD = ifc.INVM_FILD_CD WHERE eir.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}

SELECT etr.UTLINSTT_ID , etr.UTLZ_TCHN_CD , etr.RGSN_USER_ID , etr.RGSN_TS
, utc.UTLZ_TCHN_CDNM AS UTLZ_TCHN_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_TCHN_R etr LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_UTLZ_TCHN_C utc ON etr.UTLZ_TCHN_CD = utc.UTLZ_TCHN_CD WHERE etr.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}

SELECT isr.UTLINSTT_ID , isr.INVM_STG_CD , isr.RGSN_USER_ID , isr.RGSN_TS
, ccd.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_STG_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_STG_R isr LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON isr.INVM_STG_CD = ccd.COM_CD_ID WHERE isr.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}

SELECT iar.UTLINSTT_ID , iar.INVM_AREA_CD_ID , iar.RGSN_USER_ID , iar.RGSN_TS
, ccd.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_AREA_CD_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_AREA_R iar LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON iar.INVM_AREA_CD_ID = ccd.COM_CD_ID WHERE iar.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}

SELECT iar.UTLINSTT_ID , iar.INVM_AMT_CD , iar.RGSN_USER_ID , iar.RGSN_TS , iar.AMNN_USER_ID , iar.AMNN_TS
, ccd.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_AMT_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_AMT_R iar LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON iar.INVM_AMT_CD = ccd.COM_CD_ID WHERE iar.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}

SELECT FLOOR(NVL(SUM(NVL(INVM_AMT, 0)), 0) / 1000) AS INVM_AMT , REGEXP_REPLACE(REVERSE(REGEXP_REPLACE( REVERSE(TO_CHAR( FLOOR(NVL(SUM(NVL(INVM_AMT, 0)), 0) / 1000) )), '([0-9]{3})','\1,')), '^,','') AS INVM_AMT_STR FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PRTF_L WHERE 1=1
AND OPPB_YN = #{oppbYn}

SELECT tbivpd.UTLINSTT_ID , tbivpd.PRTF_ID
, tbivpd.INVM_FILD_CD , tbivpd.UTLZ_TCHN_CD , tbiic.INVM_FILD_CDNM AS INVM_FILD_NM , tbiutc.UTLZ_TCHN_CDNM AS UTLZ_TCHN_NM
, tbivpd.INVM_ENPR_NM , tbivpd.INVM_ENPR_LGTY_IMG_ID AS IMG_FILE_ID , tbivpd.INVM_ENPR_LGTY_IMG_ID AS FILE_ID
, tbivpd.INVM_STG_CD , ccd.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_STG_NM
, tbivpd.INVM_AMT , tbivpd.INVM_PRFR_DT , CASE WHEN tbivpd.OPPB_YN IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE tbivpd.OPPB_YN END AS OPPB_YN , tbivpd.RGSN_USER_ID , tbivpd.RGSN_TS , tbivpd.AMNN_USER_ID , tbivpd.AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PRTF_L tbivpd LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_FILD_C tbiic ON tbivpd.INVM_FILD_CD = tbiic.INVM_FILD_CD LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_UTLZ_TCHN_C tbiutc ON tbivpd.UTLZ_TCHN_CD = tbiutc.UTLZ_TCHN_CD LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON ccd.COM_CD_ID = tbivpd.INVM_STG_CD
WHERE tbivpd.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
AND tbivpd.OPPB_YN = #{oppbYn}
ORDER BY tbivpd.INVM_PRFR_DT DESC

SELECT vpl.INVM_FILD_CD AS PFRC_INVM_FILD_CD , ifc.INVM_FILD_CDNM AS PFRC_INVM_FILD_NM , NVL(COUNT(vpl.INVM_FILD_CD), 0) AS PFRC_INVM_FILD_CNT , RATIO_TO_REPORT(NVL(COUNT(vpl.INVM_FILD_CD), 0)) OVER() AS PFRC_INVM_FILD_RATIO , ROUND(RATIO_TO_REPORT(NVL(COUNT(vpl.INVM_FILD_CD), 0)) OVER(), 2) * 100 AS PFRC_INVM_FILD_PERCENT FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PRTF_L vpl LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_FILD_C ifc ON vpl.INVM_FILD_CD = ifc.INVM_FILD_CD WHERE vpl.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} GROUP BY vpl.INVM_FILD_CD, ifc.INVM_FILD_CDNM

SELECT COUNT(*) AS INVM_PRFR_CNT , CASE WHEN MAX(oppb_check.OPPB_YN) IS NULL THEN NVL(SUM(NVL(INVM_AMT, 0)), 0) ELSE NULL END AS INVM_AMT , CASE WHEN MAX(oppb_check.OPPB_YN) IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS OPPB_YN FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PRTF_L vpl LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT OPPB_YN, UTLINSTT_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PRTF_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND OPPB_YN = 'N' ) oppb_check ON vpl.UTLINSTT_ID = oppb_check.UTLINSTT_ID WHERE vpl.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND vpl.OPPB_YN = 'Y'

SELECT NVL(vpl.INVM_AMT, 0) AS INVM_AMT , ym_dual.INVM_PRFR_YM , SUBSTR(ym_dual.INVM_PRFR_YM, 0, 4) AS INVM_PRFR_YEAR , SUBSTR(ym_dual.INVM_PRFR_YM, 5, 6) AS INVM_PRFR_MONTH FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -LEVEL + 1), 'YYYYMM') INVM_PRFR_YM FROM DUAL CONNECT BY TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12), 'YYYYMM') < TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -LEVEL + 1), 'YYYYMM') ) ym_dual LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUBSTR(INVM_PRFR_DT, 0, 6) AS INVM_PRFR_YM , NVL(SUM(NVL(INVM_AMT, 0)), 0) AS INVM_AMT FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PRTF_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND OPPB_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY SUBSTR(INVM_PRFR_DT, 0, 6) ) vpl ON vpl.INVM_PRFR_YM = ym_dual.INVM_PRFR_YM WHERE ym_dual.INVM_PRFR_YM IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ym_dual.INVM_PRFR_YM ASC

SELECT vtd.UTLINSTT_ID , vtd.RPRS_CROF_ID , vtd.RPRS_CROF_NM , vtd.RPRS_CROF_JBCL , vtd.CRR_CON , vtd.CROF_IMG_FILE_ID AS IMG_FILE_ID , vtd.CROF_IMG_FILE_ID AS FILE_ID
, vtd.RGSN_USER_ID , vtd.RGSN_TS , vtd.AMNN_USER_ID , vtd.AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_TMMB_L vtd WHERE vtd.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY vtd.RGSN_TS

SELECT vtd.UTLINSTT_ID , vtd.RPRS_CROF_ID , vtd.RPRS_CROF_NM , vtd.RPRS_CROF_JBCL , vtd.CRR_CON , vtd.CROF_IMG_FILE_ID AS IMG_FILE_ID , vtd.CROF_IMG_FILE_ID AS FILE_ID
, vtd.RGSN_USER_ID , vtd.RGSN_TS , vtd.AMNN_USER_ID , vtd.AMNN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_TMMB_L vtd WHERE vtd.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} ORDER BY vtd.RGSN_TS

SELECT vtd.INVT_ID , vtd.RPT_DSNC , vtd.FILE_ID , vtd.LADA , vtd.RGSN_TS , vtd.RGSN_USER_ID , vtd.AMNN_TS , vtd.AMNN_USER_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ORRP_M vtd WHERE vtd.INVT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND vtd.RPT_DSNC = #{rptDsnc} ORDER BY vtd.RPT_DSNC DESC

SELECT vtd.INVT_ID , vtd.RPT_DSNC , vtd.FILE_ID , vtd.LADA , vtd.RGSN_TS , vtd.RGSN_USER_ID , vtd.AMNN_TS , vtd.AMNN_USER_ID , S2.FILE_NM FROM TB_BOX_IVT_ORRP_M vtd LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M S2 ON vtd.FILE_ID = S2.FILE_ID WHERE vtd.INVT_ID = #{invtId} ORDER BY vtd.RPT_DSNC DESC

SELECT A.* , RANK() OVER(ORDER BY A.RGSN_TS DESC) FROM ( SELECT vpm.UTLINSTT_ID , tbivcl.INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD , ccd.COM_CD_NM AS INVM_CMP_PTRN_NM , vpm.INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID , vpm.PAGE_TTL , vpm.PAGE_CON , vpm.HMPG_URL , vpm.RPRS_IMG_FILE_ID AS IMG_FILE_ID , vpm.RPRS_IMG_FILE_ID AS FILE_ID
, vpm.DEL_YN , vpm.RGSN_USER_ID , vpm.RGSN_TS , vpm.AMNN_USER_ID , vpm.AMNN_TS , CASE WHEN evnt.INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ONGOING_YN , ROWNUM AS rnum FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PAGE_M vpm LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_VNCM_CPTL_L tbivcl ON vpm.UTLINSTT_ID = tbivcl.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd ON ccd.COM_CD_ID = tbivcl.INVM_CMP_PTRN_CD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PG_EVT_L WHERE TO_CHAR(EVNT_STDY_TS, 'YYYYMMDD') <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') <= TO_CHAR(EVNT_FNDA_TS, 'YYYYMMDD')
GROUP BY UTLINSTT_ID , INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID ) evnt ON evnt.INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID = vpm.INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID
WHERE vpm.DEL_YN = 'N' AND evnt.INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID IS NOT NULL AND tbivcl.USE_YN = 'Y' AND tbivcl.UTLINSTT_ID IS NOT NULl ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.RANDOM ) A WHERE ROWNUM < 10

SELECT vpm.UTLINSTT_ID , vpm.INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID , vpm.PAGE_TTL , vpm.PAGE_CON , vpm.HMPG_URL , vpm.RPRS_IMG_FILE_ID AS IMG_FILE_ID , vpm.RPRS_IMG_FILE_ID AS FILE_ID
, vpm.DEL_YN , vpm.RGSN_USER_ID , vpm.RGSN_TS , vpm.AMNN_USER_ID , vpm.AMNN_TS
, CASE WHEN evnt.INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ONGOING_YN
FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PAGE_M vpm
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PG_EVT_L WHERE TO_CHAR(EVNT_STDY_TS, 'YYYYMMDD') <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') <= TO_CHAR(EVNT_FNDA_TS, 'YYYYMMDD')
GROUP BY UTLINSTT_ID , INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID ) evnt ON evnt.INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID = vpm.INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID
WHERE vpm.DEL_YN = 'N' AND vpm.UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId}
AND CASE WHEN evnt.INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END = #{ongoingYn}
ORDER BY vpm.RGSN_TS

SELECT vpm.UTLINSTT_ID , eim.ETNM AS BPLC_NM , vpm.INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID , vpm.LGTY_IMG_FILE_ID , fam_lgty.FILE_NM AS LGTY_IMG_FILE_NM , vpm.HMPG_URL , vpm.DTL_LKNG_URL_ADR , vpm.RPRS_IMG_FILE_ID , fam_rprs.FILE_NM AS RPRS_IMG_FILE_NM , vpm.PAGE_TTL , vpm.PAGE_CON , vpm.INRD_IMG_FILE_ID , fam_inrd.FILE_NM AS INRD_IMG_FILE_NM
, vpm.INRD_TTL , vpm.INRD_CON , vpm.FUND_AMT , vpm.TTAL_IVEN_CNT , vpm.ETVL_AMT , vpm.INVM_RTRV_ENPR_CNT , vpm.CSCN_TPN , vpm.CSCN_EML_ADR , vpm.CSCN_HMPG_URL , vpm.CSCN_CPYR_CON , vpm.INVM_APLC_ABYN
, vpm.DEL_YN , vpm.RGSN_USER_ID , vpm.RGSN_TS , vpm.AMNN_USER_ID , vpm.AMNN_TS
FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PAGE_M vpm LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_ENPR_INFO_M eim ON vpm.UTLINSTT_ID = eim.UTLINSTT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M fam_lgty ON fam_lgty.FILE_ID = vpm.LGTY_IMG_FILE_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M fam_rprs ON fam_rprs.FILE_ID = vpm.RPRS_IMG_FILE_ID LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M fam_inrd ON fam_inrd.FILE_ID = vpm.INRD_IMG_FILE_ID WHERE vpm.INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID = #{invmCmpExusPageId} AND vpm.DEL_YN = 'N'

SELECT vpel.UTLINSTT_ID , vpel.INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID , vpel.EVNT_SQN , vpel.RPRS_IMG_FILE_ID AS IMG_FILE_ID , fam.FILE_ID , fam.FILE_NM
, vpel.EVNT_BKMR_URL , vpel.EVNT_TTL , vpel.PAGE_EVNT_CON AS EVNT_CON , vpel.EVNT_STDY_TS , vpel.EVNT_FNDA_TS
, TO_CHAR(vpel.EVNT_STDY_TS, 'YYYYMMDD') AS EVNT_STDT , TO_CHAR(vpel.EVNT_FNDA_TS, 'YYYYMMDD') AS EVNT_FNDT
, vpel.RGSN_USER_ID , vpel.RGSN_TS
, CASE WHEN TO_CHAR(vpel.EVNT_STDY_TS, 'YYYYMMDD') <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') <= TO_CHAR(vpel.EVNT_FNDA_TS, 'YYYYMMDD') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS ONGOING_YN FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PG_EVT_L vpel LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M fam ON fam.FILE_ID = vpel.RPRS_IMG_FILE_ID WHERE vpel.INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID = #{invmCmpExusPageId}
SELECT UTLINSTT_ID , INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID , FAQ_SQN , FAQ_QSTN , FAQ_RPLY , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PG_FAQ_L WHERE INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID = #{invmCmpExusPageId}

SELECT vpbl.UTLINSTT_ID , vpbl.INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID , vpbl.BNNR_SQN , vpbl.BNNR_IMG_FILE_ID AS IMG_FILE_ID , fam.FILE_ID , fam.FILE_NM , vpbl.RGSN_USER_ID , vpbl.RGSN_TS FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PG_BAN_L vpbl LEFT JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_FILE_ATCH_M fam ON fam.FILE_ID = vpbl.BNNR_IMG_FILE_ID WHERE vpbl.INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID = #{invmCmpExusPageId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PAGE_M SET DEL_YN = 'Y' , AMNN_USER_ID = #{amnnUserId} , AMNN_TS = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID = #{invmCmpExusPageId}
DELETE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_TMMB_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND RPRS_CROF_ID = #{rprsCrofId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PG_EVT_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID = #{invmCmpExusPageId}
DELETE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PG_FAQ_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID = #{invmCmpExusPageId}
DELETE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_VC_PG_BAN_L WHERE UTLINSTT_ID = #{utlinsttId} AND INVM_CMP_EXUS_PAGE_ID = #{invmCmpExusPageId}
